name: ard-kit
description: Shared schemas, validators, fixtures, and helpers for preview ARD / AI Catalog work.

scripts.build: tsc --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --resolveJsonModule --declaration --outDir dist --rootDir src src/index.ts src/validateAiCatalog.ts src/types.ts src/fixtures.ts
